# Test: Full catalog pipeline — tags → generate → search
#
# This scenario validates the complete catalog workflow end-to-end:
# 1. Initialize a canonical repo
# 2. Create release tags simulating published APIs across multiple formats
# 3. Run `apx catalog generate` to build the catalog from tags
# 4. Run `apx search` to verify the generated catalog is searchable
# 5. Run `apx show` to verify catalog-enriched identity output
#
# This is the integration test that connects the generate and search
# halves of the catalog system together.

# Setup: Create a canonical repo with git history and release tags
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec git config user.email 'test@test.com'
exec git config user.name 'Test'
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# Initial commit so tags work
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init'

# Simulate API releases via tags (the same mechanism CI uses)
# Proto: payments/ledger — stable (has multiple stable releases)
exec git tag proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.0.0
exec git tag proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.1.0
exec git tag proto/payments/ledger/v1/v1.2.3

# Proto: payments/wallet — beta only (no stable release yet)
exec git tag proto/payments/wallet/v1/v1.0.0-beta.1
exec git tag proto/payments/wallet/v1/v1.0.0-beta.2

# OpenAPI: iam/roles — alpha only (experimental)
exec git tag openapi/iam/roles/v2/v2.0.0-alpha.1
exec git tag openapi/iam/roles/v2/v2.0.0-alpha.3

# Proto: users/profile — stable + prerelease
exec git tag proto/users/profile/v1/v1.0.0
exec git tag proto/users/profile/v1/v1.1.0-rc.1

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 1: Generate catalog from git tags
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx catalog generate --org=testorg --repo=apis
stdout 'Catalog generated'
stdout '4 APIs discovered'
exists catalog/catalog.yaml

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 2: Search all APIs — should find all 4
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
stdout 'roles'
stdout 'profile'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 3: Search by name — should filter correctly
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search ledger
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'profile'

exec apx search wallet
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'ledger'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 4: Search by format — proto vs openapi
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search --format=proto
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
stdout 'profile'
! stdout 'roles'

exec apx search --format=openapi
stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'profile'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 5: Search by lifecycle — stable vs beta vs experimental
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search --lifecycle=stable
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'profile'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'roles'

exec apx search --lifecycle=beta
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'roles'

exec apx search --lifecycle=experimental
stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 6: Search by domain
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search --domain=payments
stdout 'ledger'
stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'profile'

exec apx search --domain=iam
stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'ledger'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 7: Search by api-line
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search --api-line=v2
stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'profile'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 8: Combined filters
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search --format=proto --domain=payments --lifecycle=stable
stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'profile'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 9: Show — verify catalog-enriched output for a stable API
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx show proto/payments/ledger/v1
stdout 'API:.*proto/payments/ledger/v1'
stdout 'Format:.*proto'
stdout 'Domain:.*payments'
stdout 'Lifecycle:.*stable'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*v1.2.3'
! stdout 'No catalog data found'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 10: Show — verify a prerelease-only API
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx show openapi/iam/roles/v2
stdout 'API:.*openapi/iam/roles/v2'
stdout 'Lifecycle:.*experimental'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*none'
stdout 'Latest prerelease:.*v2.0.0-alpha.3'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 11: Show — mixed stable + prerelease
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx show proto/users/profile/v1
stdout 'API:.*proto/users/profile/v1'
stdout 'Lifecycle:.*stable'
stdout 'Latest stable:.*v1.0.0'
stdout 'Latest prerelease:.*v1.1.0-rc.1'

# --------------------------------------------------------
# Step 12: No matches for nonsense query
# --------------------------------------------------------
exec apx search nonexistent
! stdout 'ledger'
! stdout 'wallet'
! stdout 'roles'
! stdout 'profile'
